description: Completed a six-month, industry-based research internship for my M.Sc. in HCID. Planned and executed the complete end-to-end UCD redesign of a CMMS mobile application, collaborating directly with clients and developers.

Advanced into a full-time role to design and improve the user experience for VR training applications and new web interfaces. Sole designer on the Launch VR Team, responsible for creation from concept to user validation.
Completed an internship focused on designing User Interfaces for Virtual Reality (VR) applications. Utilized UI design tools to prototype immersive interfaces and gathered feedback from users.
